required_fields.label: Core competencies
required_fields.placeholder: List your top 3-5 core competencies or service areas...

required_fields.label: NAICS codes
required_fields.placeholder: List your primary NAICS codes (e.g., 541512 - Computer Systems Design)

required_fields.label: Key differentiators
required_fields.placeholder: What makes your company uniquely qualified? Proprietary tools, clearances, certifications, specialized expertise...

required_fields.label: Past performance highlights
required_fields.placeholder: Summarize 2-3 of your most impressive contracts or projects with outcomes...

optional_fields.label: Set-aside / socioeconomic status
optional_fields.placeholder: e.g., 8(a), SDVOSB, WOSB, HUBZone, Small Business

optional_fields.label: Facility / personnel clearances
optional_fields.placeholder: e.g., Facility clearance: Secret, Key personnel: Top Secret/SCI

optional_fields.label: Certifications
optional_fields.placeholder: e.g., ISO 9001, ISO 27001, CMMI Level 3, FedRAMP

optional_fields.label: Company overview
optional_fields.placeholder: Brief company history, size, locations, and mission...

optional_fields.label: Target agencies
optional_fields.placeholder: Which agencies are you targeting with this capability statement?

file_upload_prompts.label: Upload your company logo and brand guidelines
Upload any existing capability statements or marketing materials for reference

sections.label: Core Competencies
sections.instructions: 3-5 bullet points highlighting your primary service capabilities. Each should be concise but specific enough to demonstrate depth.

sections.label: Past Performance
sections.instructions: 2-3 brief past performance examples showing contract name, client, value, and measurable outcome. Format for quick scanning.

sections.label: Differentiators
sections.instructions: 3-4 crisp bullet points on what sets you apart from competitors. Focus on unique value, not generic claims.

sections.label: Company Overview
sections.instructions: Brief company description including founding year, size, headquarters, and mission. Include CAGE, UEI, NAICS, and set-aside status.

sections.label: Contact Information
sections.instructions: Full contact block with company name, address, POC name, phone, email, and website.
